chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1605 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui. Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 17.05.2022 Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. == The petitioners by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents from interfering with their possession over their houses in village “Siddique Panhwar”. With this, they have also sought for compensation for allegedly dismantling and damaging their houses by the respondents. If, the petitioners are having a feeling that they are going to be dispossessed by the respondents by causing damage to their houses, then such dispute involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its writ jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with the pending application, if any. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
